summary: Iteration 75 - TrendScout Homepage Clarity & Usability Improvements Testing Complete. All 14 existing smoke tests pass. All 14 new features verified via Playwright UI testing.
passed_tests: SMOKE: All 14 existing smoke tests pass (/, /robots.txt, /sitemap.xml, /login, /signup, auth pages, security headers, API errors, auth flow, profile, /trending-products, /trending-products-today)
UI: Hero headline: 'Find products worth testing before you waste money on ads'
UI: Hero subheadline mentions 'multi-signal AI launch score'
UI: Primary CTA says 'Browse Trending Products'
UI: Secondary CTA says 'See How It Works'
UI: How TrendScout Works section exists with 3 steps
UI: Step 2 says 'Check the launch score' with demand, competition, ad potential
UI: Winning Product Example section with 'Magnetic Spice Rack', score 78/100, Demand: Rising, Competition: Moderate, Est. Profit: $12-$18/unit
UI: Start Here panel with 3 steps and 'Start Now' button
UI: Navigation labels: Find Products, Leaderboard, Examples, Pricing, Help
UI: /help page loads with FAQ section, How it works, Support contact
UI: /demo page loads with Example Product Analysis, Example Launch Plan, Example Ad Ideas sections
UI: /signup page has confirm password field, password rules (min 8 chars, at least 1 number)
UI: /login page has 'Forgot your password?' link
UI: Dashboard sidebar: 'Product Analysis' (was My Stores), 'Market Data' (was Competitors)
UI: Footer has Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, contact email, company info

verified_features.requirement: Find products worth testing before you waste money on ads

success_rate.frontend: 100% (14/14 smoke tests + all 14 new UI features verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 75 tested all 19 homepage clarity/usability improvements from Parts 1-6, 15-17, 19. All features verified: (1) Hero headline, (2) Hero subheadline with 'multi-signal AI launch score', (3) Primary CTA 'Browse Trending Products', Secondary CTA 'See How It Works', (4) How TrendScout Works Step 2 'Check the launch score', (5) Winning Product Example with Magnetic Spice Rack, (6) Start Here panel, (7) Updated nav labels, (8-9) /help and /demo pages, (10) /signup confirm password + password rules, (11) /login forgot password link, (12) Dashboard sidebar labels. All 14 smoke tests pass.
